reviews.review_description: I originally played this game on the computer with my brother. It was nice to replay the game. I loved how both the original puzzles and the new random puzzles were there. Your team did an amazing job immersing us into the ages of Myst. This review should’ve been done a long time ago by me, I got the game the day it dropped. I’m more exited about how I can now also include this. Thank you for adding Rime. I got the game real myst on my tablet years ago. Loved the new age Rime that was added. I’m still working on solving the puzzles on the age of Rime, but that is part of the fun 😁. Fingers crossed for Myst Exile and Myst Revelations on VR. Keep up the good work Myst Team.  ￼
I’ve never played Myst and I’m so glad I bought it. The logic and puzzles are not easy, but they’re really neat. Such a beautiful game.
If you played myst before you will love this. All the puzzles you loved in an amazing VR experience. And my teenager loved it too, so even new players will be happy

New improved graphics, game just keeps getting better and better. 

Every puzzle solved without looking up how to do it is pretty satisfying and probably the reason this game has those high ratings.

Thank you Cyan for reviving Myst in VR.
Have enjoyed this since release on Quest2 and again on Quest3.

Will instantly buy this again on PSVR2, should it eventually be released.

What I thought was an excellent game, so excellent, I bought Riven ready for when I finished it, became a sudden problem on the Stone Age ship where I got stuck in the ships wall and everything went black. I can’t get out. No controls work appart form exit. Quite close to the end so I refuse to start again. I also refunded Riven as a consequence.....as I now hear of similar bugs and now believe the reviews.
In addition to this review on completion the game is pretty good despite the occasional glitch, upgraded to 4 stars

UPDATE TO MY REVIEW (4/19):  I reached out to the developers about my issue.  They responded very quickly.  I was impressed.  Once I told him what he needed to know about the version and what platform I was playing on, I didn't hear anything back.  Then I get the email that the developer had responded to my review.  They had done another update to the game.  I just want to say THANK YOU!  THANK YOU!  I followed the steps and was very excited to see my previous progress can be transferred to the latest version.  I'm changing my rating from 2 stars to 5 because they responded quickly and really seemed to care about their game and the players experience.  I look forward to moving forward in the game and also playing Riven.  Thanks again!

I hadn't played the game in a while and I had made it to the Selenitic Age.  When I started playing again a couple of days ago, the game did an update.  Well, I lost all my saved plays including the last time I played.  Now I have to start all over.  I am so upset.  We will see what else has changed.

When it comes to adventure game,, story line and LOGIC sequence of puzzles are crucial. This game lacks both rules. What a messy and senseless puzzles with no purpose in the storyline.  What could be a decent game (some stunning graphics) became a dull game  without order or harmony. I didn't even finished it.

reviews.review_title: Update made the game significantly worse
reviews.review_description:
Since the most recent update (20th of March, 2025), the game is now bordering on unplayable. 

Let's start off with performance.. First off, they appear to be using dynamic resolution, dynamic foveated rendering, and Application Space Warp. All the tricks. They do this to achieve an incredibly modest bump in overall detail. Trust me, it's nothing huge. And these tricks.. well, they come at a cost, especially if you're not careful with them. Dynamic resolution, dynamic foveated rendering.. these are tools to give developers a little extra wiggle room, but performance should still try and remain as consistent as possible. With dynamic resolution, large swings in headroom can cause the image to experience sudden, harsh drops in resolution, only for clarity to return moments later just to drop off again. With dynamic foveation, performance inconsistencies can cause you to cycle between little to no foveated rendering to the max amount. These issues are very much present on the updated Myst, but it gets worse. This is additionally bundled by the artifacting that Application Space Warp causes, which many can be sensitive to. Oh, but it gets even worse. All of these tricks, all of these issues, all to have the game be an absolute stuttery mess anyways. Seriously, the initial island just chugs when you're walking across a stretch of it. Very disappointing. 

Secondly, the hands now feel awful. They're not positioned properly in relation to your controller, with them being what appears to be a few inches in front of where they should be. Not great. But that's minor. Past that, and for whatever reason, actually interacting with things feels incredibly inconsistent. Your hands do not properly interact with the world. It's incredibly clear that the point of interaction with your finger pointed is not actually the tip of your finger. This is quite obvious when doing the initial cave generators segment, pushing all the buttons. I could not reliably interact said buttons. I had to be very deliberate and position my hands awkwardly to not accidentally hit buttons I did not intend. It's even worse with the piano. 

Frankly, this is absurd. You have massively degraded the experience of the game for little benefit. I know I'm well past my refund period, but I will be reaching out to support to try and get one anyways.

developer_response.body:
Hello TheEPICpie, 
Please email Cyan Support (support@cyan.com) immediately for help with this. Thank you!

reviews.review_description: This game has always needed to be in vr and it is beautiful. However, there is nothing new here, so it is mostly a walk down memory lane, rather than new discoveries.

Was excited to hear about the new update, so I put my Quest 3 on and gave it a go. Sadly all of my save previous progress has been lost. As others have done, I tried to restore from a cloud backup and it didn't bring my saved progress and previous game completion back.

developer_response.body:
Hi there,

Our latest update released April 17th should have this fixed. Your save games from your previous sessions are available, and a prompt when you start up the game should inform you of next steps - visit the Help Settings menu for more information on how to access those saves.

reviews.review_description:
Having struggled with this game as a 9 year old, only getting short opportunities on the classroom computer in school, I was keen to try as an adult on VR and loved it. Maybe some fond reminiscence is in the mix, but I love the atmosphere created in Myst. I was annoyed at myself for using 1 hint, but I would say that generally the puzzles are at a great level for most people that like a good game or a puzzle but don’t do complex puzzles all the time…. Not too hard or challenging to make you give up (although I did get frustrated a bit) but enough to have satisfaction on working them out. 

(I needed to restart the game just once for a small glitch, to get back to the library, and it can feel slightly slow to load sometimes, but other than that, game play was completely flawless throughout. I wish I had known sooner that pressing down on the left joystick button meant I could move around in free roam way faster… found this out by accident)

developer_response.body:
Hi Aravisll - Thank you for this detailed review! We're so happy to see you've enjoyed our games for so many years, and that the VR version of Myst made you happy. 
Are you headed to RIVEN next? ; )

reviews.review_description: I haven’t acquire the myst environment
The Devs have fixed the game with another patch so my saves were restored  thx

developer_response.body: Thanks for letting us know! Enjoy the new Rime update :)

reviews.review_title: Looks good - latest update lost progress
reviews.review_description: As above, all saved games gone (and restore from meta’s cloud says successful but makes no difference).

developer_response.body:
Hi there,

Our latest update released April 17th should have this fixed. Your save games from your previous sessions are available, and a prompt when you start up the game should inform you of next steps - visit the Help Settings menu for more information on how to access those saves.

reviews.review_description:
[Unlike another reviewer, I did not encounter any technical issues after the latest update.]

The PC version had much better visuals but if this is your only VR option I still recommend it.

developer_response.body:
Hi there,

Sorry to hear that the Quest version of Myst did not meet your expectations for fidelity. We always hope to push what the device is capable of.

reviews.review_description: Let's me first start off by saying the game is second to none. I love the game. The puzzles are challenging and I feel like I've really accomplished something when I get them figured out. The problem I'm having is in multiple areas I'm getting "suspened" in odd places and can not move afterwards. I'm currently on the top of the elevator in the library. How i got here is beyond me but gameplay has come to a stop because I can't get it to reset me in the right place. This has happened a few times in different areas. It only happens on this Game.

developer_response.body:
Hi Brownigirl, 
There's a menu option to "Teleport to Safe Spot" if you get stuck like that. If that doesn't work, please email support@cyan.com to report the issue. Thank you!

reviews.review_description: Playing on quest 2 and some puzzle rooms are missing. The inside of the clock tower disappears as soon as I walk into the room. I cannot interact with the game levers. I cannot play the game when I can't get to the puzzles.

developer_response.body:
Hi Krista.not.found, 
That's very unusual behavior that we haven't seen reported before. Please email SUPPORT@CYAN.COM and report this. If you're playing with the Quest 2 connected to a PC, please include that system's dxdiag report for reference when you email. We'd like to have a closer look at this. Thank you!

Update: We recommend checking out the latest patch update for Myst to see if this is resolved for you.

reviews.review_description: I feel like I had a leg up in the game due to playing the Myst Walkabout Mini Golf course. Haha, uuummm, maybe. While I knew my way around that was about it. Lol. The puzzles are incredibly challenging and I did have to refer to youtube more than once. But all in all it was a great gaming experience!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review, Rivers_84! We appreciate it. Have a good holiday season! 
-C.W.

reviews.review_description:
I have played so many versions of Myst on so many platforms. It still remains one of my favorite games.
Downside to the quest version is some pretty low res textures in places.. and a bit more closed in feeling (maybe it was a view distance thing).

developer_response.body:
Thank you for this review, TWiG! 
The Quest version does not match the PC and PC VR game in textures, it's true, but it does deliver an incredible experience even given its limitations. 
We're happy to know we've made one of your favorite games. 
Best wishes, 
C.W.

reviews.review_description: I've never been able to get anywhere in this game. I can't figure out what to do with the dang switches or how to enter the space ship, or do anything but continuously roam the dang island. Stupid game.

developer_response.body:
Hi VirtualNymeria, 
We're sorry to see you're having trouble figuring out the puzzles in Myst! 
If the available online hint guides and walkthroughs can't help you get through the game, you can reach out to Meta Support to ask for a refund. 
Best wishes, 
C.W.

reviews.review_description:
I doesn't matter how i try I cannot figure out how to solve some puzzles without cheating. It is not that I do not play puzzle games, it is almost the only thing I play, but these are impossible! 
I love the game, but that is because I grew up with it. 
Am I stupid or is there some clue I missed?

developer_response.body:
Hi Peter, 
If you're having trouble with some puzzles, you may have selected the "Randomized" puzzle option at the start of your game. There is also a "1993" puzzles option, which does not randomize any of the puzzles. 
If you're having trouble, you can always reach out to support@cyan.com and they may be able to provide limited hints. Best wishes!

reviews.review_title: What Does It Do? I Hate This!
reviews.review_description:
I don't know what the game is about. The preview of the game only highlights it's a remake of an older game "I SHOULD KNOW"! I have never heard of or played "Myst".

I listened to the hologram and remembered the rotation of the tower, and I rotate the tower occasionally.

I don't know of... or ever heard of "Myst." Honesty, what is the point. There are no other places or reality written about playing out on the Myst island. No music for clues or lights... I don't know what the previous "Myst" game was, but everyone is happy about it. 

What is it? What is Myst? Do I need to see the movie or read the book; seriously?

What is the motivation?

If nobody can understand the game, like myself... who has not ever played the game, it sucks? The game stinks!
     There is no motive or campaign. I have been running around the island praying for something to happen? What is the game about? I truly believe, and Myst is proof... Game Developers have no... absolutely no common sense... I'm supposed to get-it when I admit I am clueless! 

(It's so good... that there is NO legitimate YouTube walk-through for MystVR)

developer_response.body:
Hi LeviAndrewLane, 
The game's description page on meta.com provides some detail about the game (https://www.meta.com/experiences/2719294624823942/). The rest is for you to discover as you play! 
We hope you give the game another try, but if it's not your cup of tea, you may wish to seek a refund from Meta Support. 
Best wishes,
C.W.

reviews.review_description: Whilst it is delightful to visit Myst again, the immersion and general experience is ruined by poor navigation. The problem is that the screen blanks whenever you move. If this was fixed, it would be a 5 star game.

developer_response.body:
Hi Trombarina, 
Have you tried playing with "Free Roam" enabled? That should allow you to avoid the "blanking" that happens during Teleporting. 
We hope you'll check it out.

reviews.review_description:
Fantastic open world, beautiful environment, great puzzles and story.
I had played PC games since 90s, I'm surprised I haven't come across Cyan games. Now playing only on Meta Quest platform, so I hope games will be ported and new ones will be available for Meta.
Highly recommended.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words!

reviews.review_description: I gave it 3 stars because visually they did a nice job. This was described as re-imagined, I assumed they meant visually and actual game play. I expected that once you beat the original 1993 puzzles there would be more. There wasn't.  It basically a prettier version of the original.

developer_response.body:
Hi Re-Run2, 
Sorry to see you were disappointed in the game. Thank you for your kind words about it, though. Thank you for playing! 
C.W.

reviews.review_title: Great game till occuls broke my quest
reviews.review_description: Haven't been able to use my quest thanks to Occuls making it a paperweight with an update. No phone support so no fix. Don't buy games on thr Quest Store. Occuls will steal them from you without any way to get a refund.

developer_response.body:
Hi wh3873, 
Your issue is with the Oculus Quest device, not with the game Myst.
Please contact Oculus Support for help with issues on your Quest. 
Thanks!

reviews.review_description: I’m making this short this is like my 3 or 4 favorite game ever it is so interesting and don’t look any thing up while playing because it is so much better.it has a mysterious story and I love the difficulty maybe get help from family and solve it together

developer_response.body:
Hi SamHume123, 
Thank you for your kind words! We're so happy you're enjoying the game. 
Best wishes,
C.W.

reviews.review_description: This was the first major game we tackled when we got our new quest two and unfortunately we had glitches in two different locations where we found ourselves stuck behind a wall or panel due to a glitch that required us to completely start over twice. After investing more than 15 hours into playing this game we are not willing to go any further and hope that perhaps a patch will come out in the future.￼

developer_response.body:
Hi Casaba30, 
The 1.0.2 patch updated the game with a feature to help in area where players have reported falling out of the world or being stuck behind a wall - if you haven't updated the game and played again, now's the time to try! And if you still manage to get stuck, please report the problem to us at support@cyan.com so we can see where you were stuck and investigate the issue. 
Best wishes!

reviews.review_description:
I'm a millenial and, as such, watched my father play this game. Being young i didn't think much of it and went back to playing Doom.

Now I understand.

Maybe I'm not as smart as I think I am, but these puzzles can get pretty difficult. There is a lot of traveling back and forth (possibly to pad out the game time), but luckily the scenery makes it enjoyable in the couple hours I've played on this little island. The setting is intriguing and beautiful.

The motion and game settings are fairly comprehensive. Huge props to Cyan on this aspect.

I fully recommend this game to any adult. Considering the dumpster fires of game launches around the same time, this is easily in my top 3 games of the year.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your kind words, RideTheTiger! If you get stuck (and aren't playing with Puzzle Randomization on), there are many Myst game guides online that have solutions to the original (1993) puzzles. This is one of our favorites: https://mystjourney.com/myst/walkthrough/
Best wishes.

reviews.review_description:
I played this game with my dad back in the 90s, and this is a terrific remake. Completely faithful to the feel of the first game, with a perfect roomscale VR experience. 

If you like puzzle games, stop reading and Play. This. Game.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your kind words, frank.webb.3705! 
Best wishes, 
C.W.

reviews.review_description: Everytime I try to select new game it says Player height reset. Is this just me?

developer_response.body:
Hi Skepped, 
If you're seeing the "Player Height Reset" message, you're using the wrong button to select a new game. 
Aim the controller's laser at the words "New Game" and press the trigger on that same controller. That should start the new game for you. 
Best wishes!

reviews.review_description: I bet the game is good really. Unfortunately I'm not going to find out because the download speed is ridiculously slow, painfully slow! So definitely not impressed, yet!!

developer_response.body:
Hello Binglebasaher, 
Download speeds are not affected by the game. 
To address the problem of a slow download, you'll need to contact Oculus Support to ensure your device is properly connecting to you internet for downloading, and if that does not solve the issue, contact your Internet Service Provider. 
Best wishes!

reviews.review_description: Everything is great but the free roam option makes me instantly nauseous dizzy almost sick.

developer_response.body:
Hi Martina! 
Have you tried using the "Teleportion" option in the game's Navigation mode settings? 
Using it has resolved the dizzyness issue for other players who also were upset by the smooth movement selection.
We hope this helps when you play again! 
Best wishes, 
C.W.

reviews.review_title: Fun new take on the classic
reviews.review_description: Make sure to turn of teleportation in settings and then it’s great!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the review, The.Tomcat.us! 
Best wishes, 
C.W.

reviews.review_description:
as a myst universe fan, this game is a dream come true, but the movement mechanics, walking speed, turning speed, for some reason makes me sick to the point i want to vomit after 20 - 30 mins of gameplay.  switching to the teleport feature doesn’t really help.  i wonder if there is some way to improve this, because i very much want to enjoy this game.

also the lack of inventory, picture / note taking is a disappointment.  it would be amazing to be able to store the channelwood book, then actually read / reference it in the channelwood age.  that would make more of an immersive experience

about the note taking: i’ve been using the oculus photo workaround, but sometimes when switching to the oculus menu to take a picture i lose the book that i’m holding and it’s replaced by the controller.  super frustrating. i would recommend implementing the camera system used in Exile,  that was awesome 

again growing up playing all the myst games, i really wanted to enjoy this, hopefully subsequent updates will improve this.

developer_response.body:
EDIT: The Journaling (In-Game Screenshots) feature is now added. Please update MYST and give it a try!
Best wishes, 
C.W.

reviews.review_description:
This was my first VR experience and it was amazing!  I loved the original game when it came out in 1993 and can honestly say this was one of the reasons I purchased the Oculus system.  The puzzles are just hard enough to keep you engaged but not too hard that you end up investi-googling the cheats and walk-throughs. 

Outstanding job Cyan!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your kind words, Taylorx04! 
We're very happy your first VR experience was a good one with our game. 
Best wishes, 
C.W.

reviews.review_description: Good old school game that needs a remake and something new in space

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the note and the review, BNoble77! 
This latest Myst is the remake, and we've added a number of things to make the experience's accessibility up-to-date as well as a 'random' option for players who are really familiar with the other versions of the games. Using that, players are able to tackle old puzzles that have new solutions! 
Best wishes, 
C.W.

reviews.review_description:
UPDATE FOR DEV: totally understand where you are coming from and appreciate that you’ve brought a much loved classic game to VR…but…the notebook should have been part of early dev knowing that this game has complex puzzles that require you to remember numbers, dates, images etc. 

As for sickness - even the teleport function makes me sick. I don’t experience this on any other game. I completed The Room VR in one complete sitting with no issues. I’ve played the Star Wars Vader games back to back no issues. 
There’s also plenty of people on here, reviews, YouTube videos all stating the same - this game is making people sick. 

A vignette option is an easy patch as it’s an overlay…having a centre focal dot option is also an overly… these are very easy patches. 
Granted…the notebook is something much harder to do. 

Please add the vignette and focal dot ASAP as the game is not enjoyable. 

I’ve played a lot of VR games - Moss, Star Wars, The Room etc …on oculus and psvr… but never have a played a game whereby 10mins in I start to feel sick. 

Most games that have travel in them give the option for a vignette or something to help reduce the affects of motion sickness - considering so many before me have mentioned about the sickness, you’d think the devs would have added this by now. 

And I totally agree this should have had a VR notebook. I think many how have played the various versions of Myst before would have used a notebook to help remember and figure out some of the more challenging puzzles. 

Apart from the above, the game itself is beautiful. Finally I can visit Myst and use the books as intended to go to other worlds. I would love for the rest of the games to get the same treatment but sadly this probably won’t happen. 

Once they fixed the motion stuff to help prevent sickness this game will get 5 stars…but until then I can only give it 3 because it’s not enjoyable in its current state (I’ve even got sickness bands on order in the hope they will help - no keen on taking travel sickness pills just to enjoy a game that just needs a simple patch.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for this excellent feedback, LittleMidge. Unfortunately patches are never simple, especially when adding navigation options. There is already a Teleport option for those who are adversely affected by Free Roam in VR. Hopefully this will help in your case. 
EDIT: The Journaling (In-Game Screenshots) feature is now added. Please update MYST and give it a try!
Best wishes, 
C.W.

reviews.review_description: After playing Myst and sequels for years, it’s so amazing to actually feel like I’m walking around on Myst island and the other ages. They did a great job converting it all to VR, I hope that they are working on a sequel, especially Riven and/or Myst 3 Exile

developer_response.body:
Hi Phillmgab, Thank you for the review! 
We're very happy to see you enjoyed the game. 
Best regards, 
C.W.
